quality.label: quality
quality._comment: NVENC CQ 18 approximates x264 CRF 18 for overlay-heavy content.

uquality.label: U Quality
uquality._comment: High-fidelity profile: CPU libx264 CRF 16 with a faster preset. Keeps source dimensions, frame rate, pixel format, and audio-copy behavior while avoiding oversized output and excessive encode time.
